tasks.description: Ensure the format of the test output is clear, readable, and includes actionable '💡 How to fix:' instructions if mirrors are unreachable to reduce developer cognitive load on failure.
Ensure the format of logged error messages in custom script traps is clear, uses structural visual cues, and includes actionable steps.
